tables: Bihar BPSSC Forest Range Officer (FRO) Advt. No. 10/2026 Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 16 Post

Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission  BPSSC has released the Advt. No.-10/2026: For Selection of Govt. of Bihar Those Candidates Are Interested with BPSSC Forest Range Officer FRO Can Apply Online from 16/07/2026 to 16/08/2026 . For other information related to Bihar Forest Range Officer recruitment like age limit, qualification, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement and then apply.

Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission (BPSSC) Bihar BPSSC Forest Range Officer (FRO) Recruitment 2026 BPSSC FRO Advt. No. – 10/2026 Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 16/07/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 16/08/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 16/08/2026 BPSSC Forest Range Officer Exam Date : As per Schedule Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee General / BC/ Other State : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 100/- Female Candidate (Bihar Dom.) : 100/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only

BPSSC Bihar Forest Range Officer (FRO) Notification 2026: Age Limit as on 01/08/2025 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 37 for Male Maximum Age : 40 for Female Age Relaxation Extra as per BPSSC For Forest Range Officer (FRO) Recruitment Rules.
BPSSC Bihar Forest Range Officer (FRO) Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 16 Post

Bachelor Degree with at least one subject from Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Science, Botany, Chemistry, Geology, Mathematics, Physics, Statistics or Zoology OR Bachelor Degree in Agriculture, Forestry or Engineering from any Recognized University in India. Height : Male 163 CMS, Female 152.5 CMS Chest Male Only : 79-84 CMS More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
